TH_SANAE-ABANDONED_MORIYA_SHRINE.title: Abandoned Moriya Shrine
TH_SANAE-ABANDONED_MORIYA_SHRINE.pages.I:
Before you stands the Moriya Shrine — unmistakable, as it is the place where you grew up. Yet now it looks nothing like the prosperous shrine you remember. Instead, weeds and bushes overgrow the grounds, walls and shimenawa ropes are broken and decayed, as if abandoned for a very long time. Just then, two familiar figures appear behind you — figures you could never forget: Lady Kanako and Lady Suwako. In shock, you don't catch what they said at first, only their final words: "Sanae, come with us to Gensokyo. The outside world is no longer suitable for gods to gather faith."

What do you choose?

Lose all counts on your starting relic.
Gain [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Into Gensokyo[/gold].
TH_SANAE-ABANDONED_MORIYA_SHRINE.pages.E:
"Yes, Lady Kanako, Lady Suwako."

Just as you chose before, even given another chance, you would follow the two goddesses without hesitation to that place called Gensokyo.
TH_SANAE-ABANDONED_MORIYA_SHRINE.pages.S:
"No... I'll stay..."

Perhaps out of homesickness or other reasons, you ultimately choose to remain — to stay in the outside world where miracles no longer happen, living a short, ordinary life as a mere human.
TH_SANAE-ABANDONED_MORIYA_SHRINE.pages.I: Requires: Starting relic count of 12 or more.
TH_SANAE-ABANDONED_MORIYA_SHRINE.pages.R:
"No, maybe there's... another way."

You refuse to leave your homeland, yet you also refuse to leave the two goddesses who watched you grow up. There must be another choice, a third path... You resolve to earn more faith for Moriya Shrine through your own efforts. When you come to your senses, both goddesses and the abandoned shrine have vanished, leaving only a tiny, unassuming ornament on the ground — proof that they once existed.
TH_SANAE-ANOTHER_ME.title: Another Me?
TH_SANAE-ANOTHER_ME.pages.INITIAL.descri:
You spot a familiar figure in the crowd.

At first you don't recognize her, only feeling a strange sense of déjà vu — until you glance down at a puddle by the road and realize:

Isn't that your own face?

Your mind briefly goes blank, unable to decide what to do next — should you approach her, or leave it be?

The figure is already walking away. You'll need to decide quickly.
TH_SANAE-ANOTHER_ME.pages.CHASE.descript:
You shake your head and snap out of it.

Right! Just go talk to her — that's the simplest way!
Obtain [gold]Changed Timeline[/gold].
Add a [red]Haunting[/red] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_SANAE-ANOTHER_ME.pages.TALK.descripti:
You race after her, breathless. But just as you reach her and are about to speak, she turns into a wisp of smoke and vanishes on the spot.

This strikes you with great shock — like seeing a ghost in broad daylight. Though in Gensokyo, that wouldn't be such a big deal.

As you're about to leave, you notice a small ornament left where she disappeared — as if proof she was ever there.

You pocket it. Maybe it'll come in handy later.
TH_SANAE-ANOTHER_ME.pages.IGNORE.descrip:
You think better of it and decide to leave her be.

You have more important things to do right now. Perhaps that was just a hallucination from lack of rest.
TH_SANAE-COLLECT_BAD_LUCK_HINA.title: The Misfortune-Collecting Goddess
TH_SANAE-COLLECT_BAD_LUCK_HINA.pages.INI: You encounter Hina Kagiyama, who is spinning and collecting misfortune on the road. You didn't expect her to be in the tower as well.
TH_SANAE-COLLECT_BAD_LUCK_HINA.pages.PUR:
"Could you help me get rid of some bad luck, Miss Hina?"

You ask Hina Kagiyama, and she does not refuse.

After a few rounds of her mysterious spinning ritual around you, you feel a great lightness — as if all the bad things have been dispelled.
TH_SANAE-COLLECT_BAD_LUCK_HINA.pages.INI: Requires: Ashes of the Hina Doll.
TH_SANAE-COLLECT_BAD_LUCK_HINA.pages.REQ:
You show Hina the ashes left by the Hina doll. Her expression turns serious.

"That must have been caused by extremely powerful misfortune — the doll burst before it could be collected."

"What should we do then?"

"I'll travel with you. Though I naturally leak some misfortune, it's on a completely different scale from what you're carrying now."
TH_SANAE-COLLECT_BAD_LUCK_HINA.pages.BUY:
"By the way, do you have any extra Hina dolls? I'd like to buy one for protection on the road."

"Of course. Here you go."

With that, Hina pulls out a Hina doll from her clothes and hands it to you.
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_BRANCH.title: Moriya Branch Shrine
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_BRANCH.pages.INITIAL.des:
Before you stands a branch shrine — you never expected to see one inside the tower. Upon closer inspection, you realize it's a branch of Moriya Shrine.

This discovery shocks you, but you also notice that the branch is empty — no worshippers, no shrine maiden. However, all the necessary ritual tools and offerings are present. Perhaps you could rest here for the night before continuing.
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_BRANCH.pages.REST.descri:
Without hesitation, you head to the visitors' room, lie down on the bed, and prepare for a short rest.

After a brief rest, you feel much better both mentally and physically.

Now that you're refreshed, it's time to continue on your way.
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_BRANCH.pages.PRAY.descri:
Even though it's your own shrine, it would be too pitiful without any offerings.

You place some money into the offering box and pray to Lady Suwako and Lady Kanako. As if answering your prayer, you feel a warm surge flow through you.

After the offering, it's time to move on.
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_BRANCH.pages.TAKE_TALISM:
For some reason, the layout of this branch shrine is exactly the same as the one you built at the foot of the mountain for worshippers.

Even the talismans you placed before are still hanging there — genuine Moriya-made talismans infused with the divine power of the two goddesses. This couldn't be more convenient.

After taking a talisman, it's time to continue your journey.
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_BRANCH.pages.MAKE_WINE.d:
With time to spare, you decide to replenish your chewing wine.

After some hard work, you produce a small batch — not much, but enough to be useful in certain situations.

However, making the wine took a long time, and you can't afford to delay any further. You must leave immediately.
TH_SANAE-NEWSPAPER_SALE.title: Newspaper Salesman
TH_SANAE-NEWSPAPER_SALE.pages.INITIAL.de:
"Buy a newspaper?"

Just as you're passing by an inn, a thin man steps out from the glass door behind you, blocking your path.

His face wears a professional smile, though he looks somewhat reluctant.

He listlessly fiddles with a stack of newspapers in his hand, looking at you with a questioning gaze, awaiting your answer.
TH_SANAE-NEWSPAPER_SALE.pages.BUY.descri:
"Thank you for your patronage. Your newspaper." The man mutters a half-hearted courtesy, then randomly pulls one from the pile and hands it to you.

He then shuffles off to somewhere farther, mumbling something like "only five more to go..."
TH_SANAE-NEWSPAPER_SALE.pages.LEAVE.desc:
In any case, the man seems far too suspicious, and you have no use for a newspaper anyway. You simply refuse him.

The man seems used to this reaction — he doesn't press you, merely watches you leave with a sigh.
TH_SANAE-SEARCH_FOR_NEWS_TENGU.title: The News-Gathering Tengu
TH_SANAE-SEARCH_FOR_NEWS_TENGU.pages.INI:
"Oh my, if it isn't Sanae, the wind priestess of Moriya Shrine! Would you be interested in an interview? I'll pay you in both compensation and faith, of course."

As you pass through an alley, a familiar figure appears before you — it's the infamous tengu reporter, Aya Shameimaru.

What will you do?
TH_SANAE-SEARCH_FOR_NEWS_TENGU.pages.REQ:
"Aya, would you like to travel together? You can do interviews along the way."

"Of course! I didn't know Sanae was so interested in my news." Aya eyes the Bunbunmaru Newspaper in your hand, clearly misunderstanding something.

There's no need to correct her, so you just nod in agreement.

"Let's go then — we can chat on the road."
TH_SANAE-SEARCH_FOR_NEWS_TENGU.pages.INI:
Gain [gold]{Gold}[/gold] Gold.
Add a [red]Regret[/red] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_SANAE-SEARCH_FOR_NEWS_TENGU.pages.INT:
After a series of questions from tricky angles, Aya finally stops talking and hands over the promised payment.

But you can already imagine how much of a headache the next Bunbunmaru issue will be.
TH_SANAE-SEARCH_FOR_NEWS_TENGU.pages.REF:
You decide not to engage her further and turn to leave, lest she fabricate more nonsense.

But Aya isn't about to let you off so easily. She chases you until you're nearly exhausted before finally giving up.

— Not because she's tired, but because she decides it's not worth the trouble and she might miss other, more valuable news.
TH_SANAE-SIMILAR_SHRINE.title: A Familiar Shrine
TH_SANAE-SIMILAR_SHRINE.pages.INITIAL.de:
Before you stands an ornate shrine dedicated to a forgotten god. Its appearance is strange.

It's as if someone took pieces from every shrine you've ever seen and twisted them together into one.
TH_SANAE-SIMILAR_SHRINE.pages.TOUCH.desc:
You reach out a finger and gently touch the shrine. A burning sensation travels from your fingertip to your entire hand, jolting your nerves.

At the same time, the shrine's form stabilizes briefly, allowing you a moment to pray.
TH_SANAE-SIMILAR_SHRINE.pages.LEAVE.desc: You decide to ignore this strange shrine.
TH_SANAE-WIND_GOD_LAKE.title: Sacred Lake
TH_SANAE-WIND_GOD_LAKE.pages.INITIAL.des: You come across a large lake. Even at night, the water glimmers with a faint light, suggesting it possesses extraordinary properties.
TH_SANAE-WIND_GOD_LAKE.pages.DRINK.descr:
You think for a moment, then lean down and take a few sips of the mysterious water.

It's sweet and leaves a lingering aftertaste.

After drinking, it infuses your body with vital energy, and your wounds begin to heal rapidly.
TH_SANAE-WIND_GOD_LAKE.pages.BOTTLE.desc: You ponder for a moment, then take out a few small bottles and fill them with the lake water, just in case.
TH_SANAE-WIND_GOD_LAKE.pages.INITIAL.opt:
[gold]Remove[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] cards from your deck.
Add a [red]Shame[/red] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_SANAE-WIND_GOD_LAKE.pages.BATHE.descr:
Sacred lake water would work best for purification through bathing — the optimal method.

With that in mind, you remove your clothes, step into the water, and soak for a while.

The effect is as good as expected. However, for some reason, you felt an inexplicable sense of being watched, making you uneasy. You didn't stay long, quickly got dressed, and left.
TH_SANAE-SUWA_FOUGHTEN_FIELD.title: Suwa Great War
TH_SANAE-SUWA_FOUGHTEN_FIELD.pages.INITI:
You arrive at an open field and see two familiar figures facing off, seemingly about to come to blows.

A closer look reveals they are none other than Lady Suwako and Lady Kanako!

You step forward, hoping to intervene. Just then, the two notice your presence.

"You're my descendant, right? Help me defeat this one!"

Suwako says this, while Kanako crosses her arms and looks at you as well.
TH_SANAE-SUWA_FOUGHTEN_FIELD.pages.HELP_:
"You choose to oppose me, Sanae? Why..."

Suwako looks at you in confusion.

But Kanako has already attacked, and Suwako has no choice but to fight back.

"So you chose to help that frog, huh? Not surprising, I suppose."

Kanako nods, unimpressed.
TH_SANAE-SUWA_FOUGHTEN_FIELD.pages.STOP_:
"I won't help either of you! This has to stop!"

Hearing your answer, both Suwako and Kanako are taken aback.

But you've made up your mind — no matter what happens, you will maintain peace within Moriya Shrine. Let your danmaku battle wake the two goddesses up!
TH_SANAE-SUWA_FOUGHTEN_FIELD.pages.HELP_:
"Damn it... how could this... you were supposed to be my descendant..." Suwako falls to the ground, speaking bitterly, then vanishes into a wisp of smoke.

When you turn around, Lady Kanako has also disappeared. The only thing left on the ground is a pair of battered iron rings.

"Cough... cough... you win... this place is yours..."

Kanako coughs up blood, then fades into a phantom and vanishes.

When you turn around, Lady Suwako has also disappeared. The only thing left on the ground is a shattered mirror.
TH_SANAE-SUWA_FOUGHTEN_FIELD.pages.STOP_:
After you defeat both goddesses, they both vanish as if everything was just an illusion.

Looking around, you find only a strangely shaped tricolor crystal. Though you don't know its purpose, you take it with you.
